name: Fusion Force
author: Minus
Potato
LunaAstraCassiopeia
amstd
description: Adds many new Fusion Jokers, triple fusions, vouchers, a spectral, plus a deck and matching sleeve. Extra fusions with Ortalab, and new partners with Partner mod. Coding help and ideas from Luna and amstd, the first 20 fusions in the collection are mostly their work, with additional art by Gappie. Many technical parts are thanks to Potato. Bonus thanks to Maratby who's Tsunami fusion mod inspired me, and to WingedCatGirl/Minty for maintaining the base fusion mod and making my mod possible. Lastly thanks to Poxy who playtested the heck out of this mod!
